name: Charnwood East

locations.address:
Loughborough Police Station
Southfield Road
Loughborough

description:
The neighbourhood beat covers Syston, Thurmaston, Thrussington, East Goscote, Ratcliffe on the Wreake, Barkby, Barbky Thorpe, Beeby, Rearsby, Hamilton Lea, Queniborough, South Croxton and Thorpebury in the Limes.

This is a diverse mix of urban areas on the border of the City and the more rural areas further out, it has a beat team of 2 Beat Officers and 3 Community Support officers.
